finding: cmd_status and cmd_doctor call json.loads(marker.read_text()) without try/except; a corrupt or empty .hedl-tier raises an unhandled exception.
detail: cmd_install already handles this at install.py:235; cmd_status/doctor do not.
recommendation: Wrap both call sites in try/except (json.JSONDecodeError, AttributeError) and return a clean error.

finding: _flatten_projections / _flatten_inits recurse via the 'includes' list with no cycle detection; a circular tier definition causes RecursionError.
detail: Trigger: any cycle (e.g. gate.includes=[team], team.includes=[lightweight], lightweight.includes=[gate]).
recommendation: Pass a seen: set[str] through the recursion or flatten iteratively; raise a descriptive error on re-entry.

finding: release.py next_version() raises IndexError/ValueError on non-canonical --current-version, producing malformed output that breaks callers expecting full release JSON.
detail: Inputs like '1.0', 'v1.0.0', '1.0.0.0' all bypass canonical X.Y.Z form.
recommendation: Validate against r'^\d+\.\d+\.\d+$' before computing the bump; return a structured error JSON if mismatch.

finding: budget_manager.py cmd_record accepts n<=0 silently; n=0 wastes a lock cycle, n<0 decrements invocations_used below zero and flips tier backwards.
recommendation: Reject n<=0 at argparse (positive-int type) or at the top of cmd_record.

finding: install.py --tier downgrade removes projections and archives init dirs non-atomically; mid-loop failure leaves the install neither old nor new.
detail: .hedl-tier marker writes after the loop, so a partial unlink leaves marker pointing to old tier with files already gone.
recommendation: Either write the marker first, collect failures and report atomically, or require --confirm-downgrade.

finding: cmd_status -> _flatten_projections raises KeyError if .hedl-tier names a tier not in tiers.json.
recommendation: Guard tier_name lookup and return a structured error.

finding: _migrate_unversioned_to_1 copies before writing the migrated version; an interruption between copy and write leaves the source unchanged but creates duplicate archive directories on retry.
recommendation: Atomic write (tmp + os.replace); skip archive copy if a recent archive already exists.

finding: Dry-run install prints 'Done' but writes no marker; a follow-up --status reports 'no installation'.
recommendation: In dry-run mode print an explicit 'no marker written; --status will show nothing' notice.

finding: _append_gate_insight has bare `except: pass`; disk-full / read-only / corrupt log are invisible.
recommendation: Log a stderr warning (do not hard-fail the gate) on failure.

finding: check_commands silently passes when active=[] and active_item=null (the shipped template default).
recommendation: Return a WARN, not a silent skip, when work.json exists but is uninitialised.

finding: events.jsonl is appended from at least two writers (am_i_done.py and record_insights.py) with no flock; interleaving can produce lines reflect.py silently drops.
recommendation: flock the write path (same pattern as budget_manager.py _locked).

finding: _schema_ver_int silently maps non-integer schema_version values to 0 and re-runs the 0->1 migration.
recommendation: Reject non-integer schema_version with a clear error.

finding: cmd_install treats a regular file at the target path as 'directory exists, skip'.
recommendation: Use is_dir() and error if a file exists at the directory path.

category: Fork PR token scope masks skip
finding: Dependabot check skip path (403 from fork-PR github.token) returns PASS, hiding that the check did not run.
recommendation: Emit a distinct SKIP/WARN bucket when a check could not run due to token scope.

finding: check_dispatch with empty --panel returns 'minimum panel' PASS rather than an error.
recommendation: Treat empty parsed --panel as FAIL when --panel was explicitly provided.

finding: tier_description does a dict lookup with no default; an unrecognised tier raises KeyError.
recommendation: Use .get with a fallback.

finding: check_pr_template.py reads PR_BODY at module import time; reusing the module from tests does not pick up updates.
recommendation: Resolve env inside main().

category: schemas check FAIL on empty stdout
finding: check_markdown_schemas treats exit=0 + empty stdout as malformed JSON and returns FAIL.
recommendation: Short-circuit to PASS when out.strip() is empty and code == 0.

finding: init copy of .work/config/ runs once; later changes in the skill's markdown-schemas.json never reach existing installs.
recommendation: Manage .work/config/ files as projections (symlinks) or add a migration for config updates.

finding: check_pr_threads FAILs on every non-403 gh error including 5xx/timeout; brief GitHub outages block the gate.
recommendation: Distinguish transient errors and return WARN; or add bounded retries.
